title: Reserve stock before promising it
description: Atomically decrement available inventory at add-to-cart or checkout so two buyers cannot claim the last unit.
body: Use when a SKU has limited stock and concurrent buyers can compete for it. Do not check availability and then decrement in two separate steps — the gap lets two checkouts both pass the check and oversell. Actions: reserve with a single atomic conditional decrement (available = available - qty WHERE available >= qty) or a row lock, and treat a failed reservation as out-of-stock. Validation signals include reserved-plus-sold never exceeding on-hand under concurrent load. Risk boundary: overselling promises stock you cannot ship — escalate to a human before disabling reservation checks for a launch spike.
